title: Jojo's Commands
description: A mod that adds old commands back and even some extra convenient commands into Minecraft!
body:
A mod that adds back old commands and even some extra convenient ones into Minecraft!

These are the commands that currently exist:

  • /gm (0, 1, 2, 3)
  • /gamemode (0, 1, 2, 3)
  • /toggledownfall

Supported Versions:

1.7.10: N/A: None

1.12.2: N/A: None

1.14.4: N/A: None

1.15.2: N/A: None

1.16.5: N/A: None

1.17.1: N/A: None

1.18.2: N/A: None

1.19.2: N/A: None

1.19.4: N/A: None

1.20.1: N/A: None

1.20.4: N/A: None

1.20.6: N/A: None

1.21.1: N/A: None

Do note that this is the plan but things may change overtime!
